title: Pleurothallis retusa
taxonomy: Pleurothallis retusa is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Pleurothallis is a group of terrestrial orchids, native to the Americas. Within the Orchidaceae family, Pleurothallis retusa can be further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. The tribe in which it is classified is Epidendreae. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics, such as its leaves and flowers.
